metadata.title: Pricing — Remix
metadata.description: Simple, transparent pricing. Start free. Scale as you build. No surprises.

hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.description: Start free. Scale as you build. No surprises.

plans.name: Starter
plans.tagline: Supporting open source, shipping to mainnet.
features: Ollama for Local and Private LLMs
Bring Your Own LLM API key

plans.name: Pro
plans.tagline: Building your first serious dapps, learning with AI.
features: QuickDApp Front-end Generator with Unlimited Hosting
RemixAI Alchemy, Etherscan, and The Graph Connectors

items.q: What happens at month end if there are credits left?
items.a: Unused credits expire at the end of each billing period and do not roll over to the next month. Make sure to use your credits before they reset.

items.q: Are Remix credits refundable if the subscription ends?
items.a: Credits are non-refundable. When your subscription ends you retain access until the end of the current billing period.
Auto mode is included in the Pro plan. It allows Remix to choose the best AI model depending on the prompt. You can still override this and select the model you want to use.

items.q: What is the Free tier AI credit limit?
items.a: The Free tier includes a limited number of Mistral small/medium credits per month. To get more credits or access better models, upgrade to Starter or connect your own API key.
Frontend generation uses AI credits. When your monthly credits are exhausted, you can buy additional credits at Anthropic pricing or connect your own API key.
AI sub-agents extend Remix AI functionalities using skills, MCP, and more. The Pro plan includes a learning agent, a security agent, and a gas consumption checker.

items.q: What is the Frontend hosting limit?
items.a: The Pro plan supports up to 50 deployed dapps. The Team plan includes unlimited frontend hosting. Contact us for custom domain and enterprise options.

help.title: We are here to help!
help.description: If you have any inquiries regarding our various plans, don't hesitate to get in touch with our dedicated support team. They are here to provide you with tailored assistance and answer all your questions to ensure you find the best option for your needs.
help.note: We will come back to you within a few hours.
